name: Time Series Metrics Collector
description: Collect numeric metrics from a monitoring endpoint every minute and append them to a time-series table. Enables trend analysis and anomaly detection.
author: platform

config.sql: INSERT INTO metrics_timeseries (ts, http_requests_total, error_count, avg_latency_ms, active_connections) VALUES (NOW(), {{nodes.node-2.data.http_requests_total}}, {{nodes.node-2.data.error_count}}, {{nodes.node-2.data.avg_latency_ms}}, {{nodes.node-2.data.active_connections}})
